findings.description: Section s1 content is only 24 characters, below the 50-character threshold. While the source 概要 section is genuinely a single short sentence, this falls under the V3 short section check.
findings.source_evidence: Source 概要: 「データベースにマスタデータを投入する機能を提供する。」(one sentence)

findings.description: The third target name 「マスタデータ投入」 appears as a first-column value in the execution targets table but is absent from s3 hints. Per V4, property/table first-column names should be included in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: ターゲット名=「マスタデータ投入」, 説明=「上記２つのターゲットをまとめて実行する。」
